usage_note: Palette color values were exported from the GPL-3 cols4all R package. Keep license/provenance visible when redistributing plugin payloads.

series.description: Palettes from the Python library bivario
Palettes from the Hue Chroma Luminance color space
Palettes from the Python library matplotlib
Palettes inspired by The Metropolitan Museum of Art
Palettes by Oliver Fuhrer from MeteoSwiss
Colormaps for Oceanography by Thyng et al.
Scientific colour maps by Fabio Crameri
Palettes from the Python library Seaborn
